headline: Context management and agent skills break out as the day's work centers on how agents handle and retain information.
body: Context management, agent skills, and episodic memory are the leading breakouts, tracking a wave of practitioner content on provisioning context to coding agents and structuring skills through MCP integrations. Claude anchors the agent-integration story, with multiple pieces framing an Anthropic versus Microsoft fight over Teams and Slack placement and the use of external agent access to lock in recurring revenue. On the model side, Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that activates roughly 48 billion parameters per token and was trained on AI ASIC superpods rather than Nvidia GPUs. Separate commentary argues the open-source to frontier gap is narrowing toward monthly parity shifts, and Base44 launched its own model as startups chase defensibility.
